scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.postinstall: pip install -r python-backend/requirements.txt && python3 -m playwright install chromium
scripts.start: concurrently --names "python,api,web" --prefix-colors "yellow,cyan,magenta" "PYTHON_BACKEND_PORT=5050 python3 python-backend/main.py" "PORT=8080 pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev" "PORT=5173 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/ai-proxy run dev"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
